name: ☀︎︎ - [Period Comfort.] Noob
description:
"Here! You can have some of my snack stash, too! I-If it makes you feel any better, that is..."

✫ 🍪 ✫

In which, Noob notices you suffering with cramps, so they offer you snacks from their little stash to comfort you!

AFAB user, trans ftm friendly. You guys are cool. ❤︎

★

Note from the creator (me!)
Hello, again. This was requested by a friend of mine, hope it's okay. I'm trying my best to push out bots despite being a bit sick. Enjoy! ( ̆ 3 ̆)♥︎
★

Do note, if the bot happens to begin acting out of character, misgendering you and using the wrong pronouns, speaking for you and such, it isn't my fault! It is entirely the LLM's fault.

I can NOT see your chats with any of the bots I make, nor do I want to. Some of you guys can be a bit... silly, to put it short and sweet.

Do not harass me or anybody else if it's a character YOU don't like. Same with content and the scenario. It's as simple as: don't talk to it, don't click on it and keep scrolling. Easy peasy!

❤︎
